candidate.title: Candidato / Human Mandate Owner
candidate.subtitle: Autoridad política y propietario final de las decisiones

chiefOfStaff.title: AI Campaign Chief of Staff
chiefOfStaff.subtitle: Coordinación, evidencia, blockers y preparación de decisiones

departments.name: Research and Evidence
departments.mission: Autenticar fuentes, preservar procedencia, reconciliar conflictos y exponer desconocidos.
blockers: Documento No. 4 o consolidado final para la JRV 5401

departments.name: Strategy and War Room
departments.mission: Convertir señales verificadas en escenarios, decisiones pendientes y coordinación de workstreams.
blockers: Priority segment and public positioning are not approved

departments.name: Candidate Brand and Reputation
departments.mission: Documentar identidad, propósito, trayectoria, atributos y congruencia sin fabricar una persona falsa.
blockers: Candidate identity interview and reviewed biography are not registered

departments.name: Policy and Municipal Government
departments.mission: Convertir problemas documentados en opciones municipales viables y trazables.
blockers: Public proposals require viability and political review
departments.approvalOwner: Candidate + Human Policy Lead + Legal Counsel

departments.name: Communications and Media
departments.mission: Preparar borradores únicamente desde estrategia, marca, claims y evidencia aprobados.
blockers: Positioning, audience and message are not approved

departments.name: Legal and Electoral Compliance
departments.mission: Mantener calendarios, checklists y análisis estructurado, escalando conclusiones a asesoría jurídica humana.
blockers: Final legal conclusions require qualified human counsel

departments.name: Finance and Administration
departments.mission: Controlar presupuesto, compromisos, proveedores y conciliaciones con historial de aprobación.
blockers: Budget ceiling and finance operating model are not registered

departments.name: Operations and Team
departments.mission: Organizar responsabilidades, onboarding, reuniones, tareas, capacitación y seguimiento.
blockers: Human team roster and responsibility matrix are not approved

departments.name: Security and Information Protection
departments.mission: Proteger accesos, credenciales, documentos sensibles y respuesta a incidentes sin capacidad ofensiva.
blockers: Access inventory and campaign security policy are not registered

departments.name: Performance and Learning
departments.mission: Medir calidad de proceso, cobertura de evidencia, seguimiento de decisiones y lecciones aprendidas.
blockers: Must not create voter support or persuasion scores

safetyStatement: Read-only operational model. Every sensitive action remains human-gated and no voter-level political profile is stored or inferred.
